members.noSocials: No social links have been added yet.

hero.title: Find your people. Make your mark.
hero.copy: A spirited clan built on loyalty, creativity, and the kind of teamwork that turns every session into a story.

about.title: More than a clan. It’s a constellation.
about.lead: HUDAS is a welcoming corner for bold players, creative minds, and dependable teammates. We show up for the win, but stay for the people.
about.note: Bring your own light. We’ll make room for it.
about.value2Copy: Bring ideas, energy, and a little chaos.
about.value3Copy: Everyone gets a chance to shine.

officers.title: Meet the members
officers.copy: The members guiding the crew, the laughs, and the late-night plans.
officers.managerCopy: Upload a portrait for any member. Your images are saved for this HUDAS roster, and you can remove them whenever you like.
officers.fileType: Please choose a PNG, JPG, WEBP, or GIF image.
officers.fileTooLarge: That image is too large. Please choose one under 10 MB.
officers.noCustom: This officer is using the shared dummy portrait.
officers.storageError: We couldn’t save that image. Please try again.

gallery.title: Our latest Post
gallery.copy: Upload crew photos in Roster admin and they’ll become the latest snapshots here.

rules.title: Simple rules. Strong orbit.
rules.respect: Treat every member with respect. Keep the space safe, welcoming, and free of drama.
rules.communicate: Communicate clearly. Give the crew a heads-up when plans change.
rules.contribute: Bring something to the table, whether that’s skill, ideas, support, or good vibes.
rules.haveFun: Have fun and make room for others to do the same. We’re here to enjoy the ride.

footer.copy: Built with heart, held by the crew.

modal.title: Ready to join HUDAS?
modal.copy: Tell us a little about yourself. The crew will be in touch.
modal.name: Name or alias
modal.reasonPlaceholder: Tell us what brings you here...
modal.successCopy: Your signal is in the stars. We’ll get back to you soon.

admin.pageCopy: Manage the portraits shown on the HUDAS member roster.
admin.title: Sign in to roster admin
admin.copy: Use your HUDAS admin credentials to manage the crew roster and member images.
admin.invalid: Incorrect email or password. Check your login details and try again.
admin.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm the admin email in Supabase Authentication, then try again.
admin.authRequired: Please sign in with Supabase Auth before saving online changes.
admin.storageError: We couldn’t access the online database. Please try again.
admin.databasePermissionError: Supabase rejected this roster change. Run the members_admin_write policy from supabase-schema.json, then sign out and sign back in.
admin.databaseError: Supabase could not save this roster change. Check the public.members table and try again.
admin.databaseSchemaError: The public.members table is missing the socials or sort_order column. Run the complete SQL from supabase-schema.json in Supabase SQL Editor, then sign out and sign back in.
admin.databaseTableError: The public.members table is missing or has not been created. Run the complete SQL from supabase-schema.json in Supabase SQL Editor, then try again.
admin.storageUploadError: Supabase rejected this upload, so it was not saved anywhere. Run the complete HUDAS setup SQL from supabase-schema.json, confirm the hudas-media bucket exists, and make sure your signed-in account has the admin role.
admin.storageDeleteError: Supabase could not delete that image from Storage. Check the hudas-media delete policy, then try again.
admin.storageBucketMissing: Supabase cannot find the hudas-media bucket. Run the complete HUDAS setup SQL from supabase-schema.json, then try again.
admin.storagePermissionError: Supabase rejected the active session. The app refreshed your admin token once; if this continues, rerun the Storage policies from supabase-schema.json and confirm App Metadata is {"role":"admin"}.
admin.onlineCopy: Images upload automatically through your secure admin session. If Supabase Storage is unavailable, secure durable file storage keeps uploads working.
admin.onlineNotConfigured: Supabase is not configured yet. Add the values in online-config.js.
admin.storageUploading: Uploading to Supabase Storage and saving online…
admin.memberImagesCopy: Add each member with a name, role, badge, and image so the roster feels complete.
admin.memberToolsCopy: Add a name, role, badge, and image to the crew roster.
admin.socialLinksCopy: Choose a platform and add the member’s profile link.
admin.socialUrlInvalid: Enter a valid http or https profile URL.
admin.socialToolCopy: Choose a platform for any member
admin.socialToolsCopy: Pick a member, choose Facebook, Discord, or TikTok, and save the profile link.
admin.memberImageRequired: Choose an image for this member.
admin.memberImageType: Please choose a PNG, JPG, WEBP, or GIF image.
admin.memberImageTooLarge: That image is too large. Please choose one under 10 MB.
admin.memberRequired: Complete the member name, role, and badge.
admin.postToolsCopy: Share a photo with a title and description on the HUDAS gallery.
admin.moodboardToolCopy: Add a photo to the gallery
admin.moodboardToolsCopy: Upload a photo here and the newest four admin uploads will fill the main moodboard cards.
admin.postDescriptionPlaceholder: Tell the crew what is happening...
admin.postRequired: Add a title, description, and photo before posting.
admin.postFileType: Please choose a PNG, JPG, WEBP, or GIF image.
admin.postTooLarge: That image is too large. Please choose one under 10 MB.
admin.postRemoveCopy: Delete an uploaded photo from the live moodboard.
admin.removePostConfirm: Remove “{title}” from the moodboard? This cannot be undone.
admin.dashboardCopy: Open one focused tool at a time. Your roster stays tidy and easy to manage.
admin.memberToolCopy: Add a member with an image
admin.editMemberToolCopy: Update a name, role, badge, or image
admin.editMemberToolsCopy: Choose a member, update their details, and optionally replace their portrait.
admin.editSocialLinksCopy: Add or update this member’s profile links.
admin.postToolCopy: Add a snapshot to the gallery
